pub fn leaves_todo() {
    todo!();
}

pub fn leaves_unimplemented() {
    unimplemented!();
}

pub fn leaves_dbg() {
    let value = 41;
    dbg!(value);
}

/// TODO: replace this placeholder documentation with real behavior notes.
pub fn documented_todo_leftover() {
    println!("todo-doc");
}

/// FIXME: tighten this contract once the real implementation lands.
pub fn documented_fixme_leftover() {
    println!("fixme-doc");
}

pub fn leaves_panic() {
    panic!("boom");
}

pub fn leaves_unreachable() {
    unreachable!("not implemented");
}

pub fn leaves_unwrap() -> String {
    let value = Some("ready".to_string());
    value.unwrap()
}

pub fn leaves_expect() -> String {
    let value = Some("ready".to_string());
    value.expect("missing value")
}

pub unsafe fn missing_safety_comment() {
    dangerous();
}

pub fn missing_block_safety_comment() {
    unsafe {
        dangerous();
    }
}

#[cfg(test)]
mod tests {
    #[test]
    fn suppressed_in_test_code() {
        let value = Some("ready");
        todo!();
        dbg!(value);
        panic!("boom");
        unreachable!("not implemented");
        value.unwrap();
        value.expect("missing value");
    }
}
